description_long: This is a lever-action rifle with a wooden stock and forearm, featuring a long, blued steel barrel and receiver. The stock is robust and has a classic, slightly curved design, with visible wood grain and a reddish-brown finish. The lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver, indicating the rifle's action type. The barrel is slender and extends well beyond the forearm, ending in a simple front sight. The receiver and lever mechanism are finished in a darker, matte metal, contrasting with the wood. The rifle has iron sights and lacks any visible modern attachments or optics.
description: A classic lever-action rifle with a wooden stock, long blued barrel, and iron sights. The wood grain and metalwork are clearly visible.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing a narrow profile with the barrel and front sight aligned.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, lever, and long barrel.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the butt end, showing the stock's width and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the lever-action mechanism, wooden stock, and the full length of the barrel.
